title: hieracium villosum subsp. heterophylloides
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. heterophylloides, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium villosum plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Hieracium villosum subsp. heterophylloides can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
